flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Butler County Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $5.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Butler County Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (18.5% → 16.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Butler County Community College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 1.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Butler County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
